lemon_market_new_listings.description: This vehicle is in fair condition. The interior and exterior show moderate wear and some cosmetic imperfections. All major mechanical systems are functional, though some components may require maintenance in the near future.

Available now is a truly exceptional vehicle in absolute mint condition. This car has been meticulously preserved, appearing and driving as if it just rolled off the showroom floor. The exterior paint is flawless with a deep shine, and the interior is pristine, showing no signs of wear. Every mechanical and electronic component functions perfectly. For the discerning buyer seeking a vehicle in showroom state, this is an unparalleled find.

Get ready to hit the road in a car that offers fantastic value! This vehicle is in fair condition, showing some honest character and signs of use from its journeys, but it remains a dependable choice for your daily needs. It’s a great opportunity to own a reliable ride at an accessible price point. Come see the potential in this solid performer!

This vehicle is in fair condition and is being sold as a reliable, honest daily driver that shows its age and use. The exterior has several noticeable scratches, some minor door dings, and the clear coat is beginning to thin on the trunk lid. Inside, the cabin shows significant wear, including some staining on the carpets and a small tear in the driver's side seat fabric. While it runs and drives fine, it is due for some scheduled maintenance, and the tires will likely need replacing within the next few thousand miles. It is a functional and dependable car for someone who prioritizes utility and value over cosmetic perfection.
Mint condition.
The car is in poor condition. It has significant mechanical issues and visible damage to both the exterior and interior. It requires major repairs to be roadworthy.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies consistent performance and structural integrity. This unit has been thoroughly inspected to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for mechanical reliability and interior preservation. Offering a balanced synthesis of durability and refined aesthetics, it stands as a premier choice for the discerning driver seeking long-term value and dependable performance.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my weekend trips. It runs like a dream and is ready for its next adventure with a new owner! If you're looking for a dependable car that still looks great on the road, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

Offered is a mechanically sound E46 M3, featuring the high-revving S54 power plant with its signature individual throttle bodies. This example demonstrates linear power delivery and crisp throttle response. Recent proactive maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and rod bearing replacement, ensuring the longevity of the 8,000 RPM valvetrain. The subframe has been inspected and reinforced, addressing the chassis's primary stress points. Equipped with a Getrag 6-speed manual and a functional M-Variable differential lock, the drivetrain remains tight and engaging. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the suspension geometry remains true, providing the communicative feedback expected from this iconic platform.
Reliable vehicle. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minimal exterior wear. Runs smooth. Title in hand.

This well-maintained vehicle offers a fantastic balance of reliability and style. The exterior retains a deep shine, showing only minor cosmetic blemishes consistent with careful use. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is in great shape with only slight wear on the driver’s side bolster. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and scheduled maintenance, resulting in a smooth ride and responsive handling. All features, from the ice-cold air conditioning to the premium sound system, are in perfect working order. This is a solid, honest car that has been treated with respect and is ready for many more miles of dependable service.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, the automobile has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our exacting standards for roadworthiness and reliability. Its history of responsible ownership is reflected in its smooth performance and refined interior appointments. We invite serious inquiries to experience the superior engineering and enduring value of this exceptional offering.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This unit exhibits superb mechanical integrity and has been maintained to a rigorous standard, ensuring a seamless transition for its next owner. A premier choice for those seeking performance and value in a sophisticated package.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to me. It’s in great shape and runs like a dream—perfect for anyone looking for a reliable daily driver that still looks sharp on the road. I’ve taken really good care of it, so it’s ready for many more adventures with a new owner. Come take it for a spin, you’re going to love how it handles!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Minor surface wear only. Runs well.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and reliability, maintained with care and ready for its next owner. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous finish, with only minor cosmetic imperfections consistent with responsible road use. Inside, the cabin is a comfortable sanctuary; the upholstery is free of tears, and all electronic features—from the responsive infotainment system to the dual-zone climate control—are fully operational. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, benefiting from a documented history of regular oil changes and recent brake service. The tires have ample tread remaining, and the suspension provides a composed, rattle-free ride. Whether you're commuting or heading out on a weekend getaway, this car offers a dependable and premium driving experience. It’s a solid, well-kept example that looks great in any driveway.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been maintained to a rigorous standard. It offers a seamless integration of performance and reliability, ensuring a superior experience for the discerning driver. The exterior retains its original character, while the interior remains refined and well-appointed. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber automobile that balances sophisticated engineering with exceptional value.

This expertly maintained vehicle presents a distinguished profile and robust mechanical performance. Combining a well-preserved aesthetic with consistent reliability, this unit offers a superior driving experience for the discerning owner who prioritizes both quality and value. We invite you to inspect this exemplary model and secure a vehicle that reflects our commitment to automotive excellence.

Hey there! I'm parting with my reliable ride, and it's honestly such a gem. It’s been well-loved and taken care of, so it runs like a dream and is ready for all your upcoming adventures! If you’re looking for a solid, dependable car that still has tons of life left in it, this is the one for you. Come take it for a spin—you're going to love how it handles!

Offering a mechanically sound E92 M3 powered by the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8. This unit features a 6-speed manual gearbox delivering precise gate engagement and a GKN Variable M Differential for superior torque vectoring. Preventative maintenance is up to date, including reinforced rod bearings and replacement throttle actuators to mitigate common valvetrain issues. The chassis maintains its factory-spec rigidity, supported by Electronic Damping Control (EDC) that provides excellent compression and rebound characteristics. While the exterior and interior show minor aesthetic wear consistent with a well-driven enthusiast vehicle, the powertrain and subframe remain in peak operating condition. Used car in good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained engine. Minor cosmetic wear. Runs well.

Presented in a classic finish, this vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, though it shows the minor, honest character marks one would expect from a well-loved car of its age. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of comfort; the upholstery is supple and free of major blemishes, and every button, dial, and screen functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it has been fastidiously maintained with a consistent service history, ensuring the engine pulls smoothly and the transmission shifts with precision. The tires have plenty of tread remaining, and the brakes are firm and responsive. This is a reliable, turn-key example that has been cared for by a smoke-free owner and is ready for many more miles of dependable service.

We are pleased to present this exceptionally well-maintained vehicle, which demonstrates a superior balance of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement. Having passed a comprehensive multi-point inspection, this automobile offers the discerning owner a reliable and sophisticated driving experience. Its documented service history and preserved interior reflect a standard of care that ensures continued peak performance and lasting value.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a refined driving experience that exceeds the standard for its class. Rigorously inspected to ensure reliable performance, this example stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and enduring value.

Hey there! I'm parting ways with my trusty ride, and honestly, it’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me. Whether you're commuting or heading out for a weekend getaway, this car is ready to hit the road right now! It's got plenty of life left and has been well-cared for over the years. Come take it for a spin—I think you're really going to love how it handles!

This F80-generation M3 is a mechanically sound example featuring the S55 3.0L twin-turbocharged inline-six, optimized for high-thermal efficiency and a broad torque plateau. The 7-speed M Double-Clutch Transmission (M-DCT) delivers crisp, rev-matched downshifts and lightning-fast gear synchronization. Equipped with the Active M Differential and adaptive M suspension, the chassis offers exceptional torsional rigidity and precise lateral dynamics. Recent maintenance includes a comprehensive inspection of the bushings and a fresh fluid service to ensure the CFRP driveshaft and cooling circuits operate at peak performance. A driver-focused machine with a taut suspension profile and linear power delivery, ready for the enthusiast who values engineering integrity.
Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Well-maintained. No mechanical issues.

This meticulously maintained vehicle strikes the perfect balance between luxury and everyday utility. The exterior retains a deep, lustrous shine, showing only the minor character marks expected from careful road use. Inside, you’ll find a smoke-free cabin with plush seating and an intuitive dashboard where every button and dial functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, it is a dream—offering smooth acceleration, precise handling, and a comprehensive service record that confirms its consistent upkeep. From the ice-cold climate control to the pristine alloy wheels, this car is prepared to provide its next owner with years of comfortable, worry-free driving. It is a solid, honest example of a well-loved machine that performs as beautifully as it looks.

We are pleased to present this distinguished vehicle, representing an exceptional balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and showing clear pride of ownership, this unit offers a robust mechanical profile and a well-preserved interior. It stands as a premier choice for the discerning buyer seeking a reliable, high-caliber driving experience. This vehicle has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure it meets our rigorous standards for long-term reliability and safety.
